info.name: Mailchimp Transactional API
info.description:
The Mailchimp Transactional API (formerly Mandrill) enables sending personalized, one-to-one transactional emails such as password resets, order confirmations, and welcome messages. It provides high-deliverability email infrastructure with detailed analytics, templates, and webhook support.

Contact Support:
 Name: Mailchimp API Support
 Email: apihelp@mailchimp.com

request.description: Send a new transactional message through Mandrill. Supports HTML and plain-text content, inline images, attachments, merge variables, metadata, and per-recipient customization.

response.name: An array of sending results, one per recipient. Each object contains the email address, status, reject reason (if any), and the message ID.

item.name: Mailchimp Send an Email Using a Template

request.description: Send a new transactional message using a stored template. Template content blocks can be overridden with the template_content parameter. Merge variables in the template are populated from the message object.

response.name: An array of sending results, one per recipient.

request.description: Search recently sent messages and return matching results. You can filter by sending status, sender, tags, recipient, subject, and date range. Results are limited to the last 7 days.

item.name: Mailchimp Send a Raw Mime Message

request.description: Take a raw MIME document and send it exactly as provided. Mandrill will not modify the message content, but will track opens and clicks if the appropriate headers are included.
